The open-loop transfer function of a system is

 
The value of k so that the phase margin is 40° is __________. (Rounded upto two decimal places)
NAT
Correct answer: 1.44
Solution

Q2 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A unity feedback control system has an amplifier with gain kA = 16 and gain ratio  in the forward path. A derivative feedback H(s) = sk0 is introduced as a minor loop around G(s). The derivative feedback constant k0 so that the system damping factor is 0.8 is ________. (Rounded upto one decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 2.4
Solution

2.4 (2.3 - 2.5)
